description: Composition Grey and black striped polo neck T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves with ribbed hems, ribbed collar with a buttoned chest placket, embroidered branding on the left chest, and a vented hem Fitting Comfort Wash care Machine wash with warm water Do not bleach Tumble dry Warm iron Do not dry clean Nothing exudes class and elegance as much as a Levi's polo neck T-shirt. Wear this understated piece to any off-duty event to look your stylish best. Pair this tee with a classic denims and suede shoes to snazz up your style. Model statistics Product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18.5"
